sentences.target: Ich übe das Alphabet mit meiner Tochter.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈyːbə das alfaˈbeːt mɪt ˈmaɪ̯nɐ ˈtɔxtɐ/

translations.de: Ich übe das Alphabet mit meiner Tochter.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈyːbə das alfaˈbeːt mɪt ˈmaɪ̯nɐ ˈtɔxtɐ/
translations.en: I’m practicing the alphabet with my daughter.
translations.es: Estoy practicando el abecedario con mi hija.
translations.fr: Je répète l’alphabet avec ma fille.
translations.it: Sto ripassando l'alfabeto con mia figlia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在和女儿一起练字母。
translations.pt: Estou praticando o alfabeto com minha filha.
translations.he: אני מתרגל את האלפבית עם הבת שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi đang luyện bảng chữ cái với con gái.
translations.ar: أنا أتدرّب على الأبجدية مع ابنتي.
translations.nl: Ik oefen het alfabet met mijn dochter.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी बेटी के साथ वर्णमाला का अभ्यास कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Κάνω εξάσκηση στο αλφάβητο με την κόρη μου.
translations.nb: Jeg øver på alfabetet med datteren min.
translations.id: Saya berlatih alfabet bersama anak perempuan saya.
translations.sv: Jag övar på alfabetet med min dotter.
translations.da: Jeg øver alfabetet med min datter.
translations.ja: 娘といっしょにアルファベットを練習しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate, transitive (expects an accusative object).
Definite article; neuter, accusative singular; determiner of 'Alphabet'.
Common noun; neuter, accusative singular; direct object (theme) of 'übe'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a comitative prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner; 1st person singular possessor; feminine, dative singular agreeing with 'Tochter'.
Common noun; feminine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'mit'.

sentences.target: Er kennt das Alphabet noch nicht.

translations.de: Er kennt das Alphabet noch nicht.
translations.en: He doesn’t know the alphabet yet.
translations.es: Él todavía no conoce el abecedario.
translations.fr: Il ne connaît pas encore l’alphabet.
translations.pt: Ele ainda não conhece o alfabeto.
translations.he: הוא עדיין לא מכיר את האלפבית.
translations.vi: Cậu bé vẫn chưa biết bảng chữ cái.
translations.nl: Hij kent het alfabet nog niet.
translations.hu: Ő még nem ismeri az ábécét.
translations.hi: उसे अभी वर्णमाला नहीं आती है.
translations.ja: 彼はまだアルファベットを知りません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive predicate.
Definite article; neuter, accusative singular; determiner of 'Alphabet'.
Common noun; neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'kennt'.
Adverb with temporal/aspectual meaning; modifies 'kennt'; together with 'nicht' yields 'noch nicht' (“not yet”).
Negation particle; negates the predicate; in combination with 'noch' expresses 'not yet'.

sentences.target: Wir singen das Alphabet im Kindergarten.

translations.de: Wir singen das Alphabet im Kindergarten.
translations.en: We sing the alphabet in kindergarten.
translations.es: Cantamos el abecedario en el preescolar.
translations.fr: On chante l’alphabet à la maternelle.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在幼儿园唱字母歌。
translations.yue: 我哋喺幼稚園唱字母歌。
translations.ru: Мы поём песню про алфавит в детском саду.
translations.pt: Nós cantamos o alfabeto na pré-escola.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi hát bài bảng chữ cái ở mẫu giáo.
translations.nl: We zingen het alfabet op de kleuterschool.
translations.hi: हम किंडरगार्टन में वर्णमाला का गीत गाते हैं.
translations.id: Kami menyanyikan alfabet di taman kanak-kanak.
translations.ja: 幼稚園でアルファベットの歌を歌います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural, nominative; subject.
Finite verb; present indicative, 1st person plural; main predicate.
Definite article; neuter, accusative singular; determiner of 'Alphabet'.
Common noun; neuter, accusative singular; direct object (content of the singing).
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); governs dative; introduces a locative phrase.
Common noun; masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'im' (location).

sentences.target: Sie schreibt das Alphabet an die Tafel.
sentences.reading: /ziː ʃʁaɪ̯pt das alfaˈbeːt an diː ˈtaːfl̩/

translations.de: Sie schreibt das Alphabet an die Tafel.
translations.ipa: /ziː ʃʁaɪ̯pt das alfaˈbeːt an diː ˈtaːfl̩/
translations.en: She writes the alphabet on the board.
translations.es: Ella escribe el abecedario en la pizarra.
translations.pt: Ela escreve o alfabeto no quadro.
translations.he: היא כותבת את האלפבית על הלוח.
translations.vi: Cô ấy viết bảng chữ cái lên bảng.
translations.nl: Ze schrijft het alfabet op het bord.
translations.hi: वह बोर्ड पर वर्णमाला लिख रही है.
translations.id: Dia menulis alfabet di papan tulis.
translations.ja: 彼女は黒板にアルファベットを書いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular, nominative; subject (not formal 'Sie' here, as the verb is 3sg).
Finite verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Definite article; neuter, accusative singular; determiner of 'Alphabet'.
Common noun; neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'schreibt'.
Preposition; governs accusative here to express direction/goal; part of the PP 'an die Tafel' (not a separable verb prefix in this usage).
Definite article; feminine, accusative singular; determiner of 'Tafel' after directional 'an'.
Common noun; feminine, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'an' (goal).
